itinerary.title: Dubai Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
05 Nights / 06 Days Classic Dubai Family Holiday SERIAL CODE: UAE-006 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-DXB-DLX-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Dubai / UAE CATEGORY: Best Dubai Family Tour Package DURATION: 05 Nights / 06 Days DESTINATIONS: Dubai City

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the dazzling heights and golden dunes of Dubai with this TRAGUIN curated family itinerary. Designed for excitement and comfort, this Dubai Deluxe package offers a flawless blend of futuristic city exploration and traditional desert adventure. Experience the best of Emirati hospitality with TRAGUIN's handpicked hotels and exclusive services, creating unforgettable memories. THE IMMERSIVE DUBAI FAMILY EXPERIENCE Dubai is a world-class playground for families, offering endless excitement for all ages. From the towering Burj Khalifa to the thrilling dunes of a desert safari, our curated experiences promise a premium Dubai experience. With TRAGUIN, you get professional support and exclusive experiences that redefine the family holiday. Discover the iconic attractions that make Dubai a dream destination. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Dubai package (UAE-006 / TRG-DXB-DLX-2026): Dubai City with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN DUBAI
days.description: Arrive in dazzling Dubai. Your private TRAGUIN transfer will escort you to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy a relaxing evening overlooking the city’s stunning skyline.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: CITY TOUR & BURJ KHALIFA
days.description: Explore the iconic attractions of Dubai. Visit the Burj Khalifa, the Dubai Mall, and Palm Jumeirah. This curated experience offers deep insights into Dubai's luxury living and iconic attractions.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DESERT SAFARI ADVENTURE
days.description: Embark on a thrilling desert safari. Experience dune bashing, camel rides, and a traditional BBQ dinner under the stars—a highlight of TRAGUIN's exclusive packages.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: GLOBAL VILLAGE & LEISURE
days.description: A full day of immersive fun at Global Village. Explore cultural pavilions, shopping, and entertainment, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: AQUATIC FUN
days.description: Spend a day enjoying breathtaking landscapes at a premier water park. Experience exclusive experiences that define our luxury family holiday.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Enjoy a final family breakfast. Your private TRAGUIN chauffeur ensures a comfortable transfer to the airport.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
